title: Charred Polish-Style Custard Cake
description: A rich, charred dessert inspired by Polish cuisine, featuring a moist and creamy custard cake.
instructions: Sift flour and sugar into a large bowl.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, and melted butter.
Add vanilla extract and whisk until combined.
Gradually pour wet ingredients into dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
Pour batter into a greased 9-inch (23cm) round cake pan.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until edges are golden brown and center is set.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Dust with powdered sugar and serve warm.
For a charred crust, broil for an additional 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
